title: Winter Chill freezes the equipped creature

card.rawText: The equipped creature is frozen and cannot inflict Atk Damage or be sacrificed. During your opponent's turn they may roll 1 die. If the result is 5-6, unfreeze their creature and destroy this card.

plan.title: Winter Chill freezes the equipped creature
plan.summary: Equip Winter Chill to the opponent's creature, verify the equipped creature is Frozen with the no-attack-damage and no-sacrifice flags, and confirm its strike cannot inflict attack damage.

notes: Place test_primary_creature on player_2 field as primary.
Attach Winter Chill to player_2 primary; do not resolve the separate 5-6 escape roll in this fixture.

steps: Player 1 has Winter Chill equipped to player_2's primary creature.
Inspect the equipped creature's Frozen status and flags.
Attempt a follow-up battle with the frozen equipped creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Equipped creature cannot inflict attack damage
Frozen attacker cannot inflict attack damage

manualVerification: Confirm the separate opponent-turn 5-6 unfreeze roll is handled by 102-E02, not this while-equipped status fixture.
riskNotes: This covers the persistent Frozen restriction while equipped. It does not cover the escape roll or destruction of Winter Chill.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate while-equipped Frozen status and restrictions.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
